formula_requirement: same pressure basis, same dynamic-pressure normalization, same sign convention
mesh_family_requirement: coarse/medium/fine or declared equivalent for the same endpoint surfaces
time_family_requirement: same retained window plus documented neighboring windows or time-bound protocol

endpoint_label_requirement: exact alternate mesh-station labels declared before sampling
formula_requirement: same pressure and K formula across all family members
mesh_family_requirement: same topology and labels across family members
time_family_requirement: same retained window policy across family members
